storyHook: 报喜，对方祝贺，一起高兴

narrative.when: 周三下午五点，刚收到一个好消息
narrative.who: 甲（报喜的人）· 乙（同事/朋友）
narrative.how: 迫不及待地把好消息告诉对方
narrative.method: 说出好消息、分享细节经过、对方表示祝贺、约时间一起庆祝
narrative.event: 甲这次的申请通过了，第一时间想告诉乙

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have some good news!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, do say.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My request went through.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is great! How did it go?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I got your note an hour back.
turns.zh: 我一小时前收到了你的消息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are over the moon.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was jumping up and down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am so pleased for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a drink after this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, let's do that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to go to that new place on High Street.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, the one with the warm plates?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, they have cold plates too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it all right if we get a table for the end of the week?
turns.zh: 我们周末订个位子可以吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will book it under my name.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What time on day seven?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Seven, if that is good for you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Seven is all right. I will put it in my book.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am so happy this came through at last.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You worked hard for it. You have my respect.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your help with the idea was a great part of it.
turns.zh: 你帮我改方案，功劳不小。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I only gave a little push. You did the rest.
turns.zh: 我就推了一把，主要是你干的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Still, I am happy you were there when I needed it.
turns.zh: 不过，需要的时候有你在，我很高兴。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what friends are for. So, we get the warm plate?
turns.zh: 朋友就该这样。那，我们点热菜？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, and a cold plate to start. I will take the note.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did the process take long?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Six months, with many changes to the idea.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a long time. You kept at it.
turns.zh: 时间不短，你坚持下来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I almost gave up two times, but here we are.
turns.zh: 我差点放弃两次，但总算成了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. That is what is important.
turns.zh: 结果好就行，这才是关键。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. And now I can put my mind at rest.
turns.zh: 没错，现在我可以放心了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So, what is the first thing you will do?
turns.zh: 那你第一件事要做什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Have a good sleep. I have not had one in weeks.
turns.zh: 好好睡一觉，我好几周没睡好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite right. You have got it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then on the last day of the week, we have a happy time. I am ready.
turns.zh: 那周末我们庆祝一下，我准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. What time on the last day?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Seven in the evening, if that is good for you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Seven is good. Where will we go?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That place you said was good. The one with the warm plates.
turns.zh: 你说好的那家，做热菜的那家。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, I see it. That is a good one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the list of food before we go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. I would like a cold plate first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then a warm plate with cow meat, not too sharp.
turns.zh: 再来份牛肉热菜，不要太辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have the fish. Keep it soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a sweet thing after?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I would like the one with milk fat.
turns.zh: 好，我想要那个带奶油的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will have the fruit one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This will be a great day. I am happy.
turns.zh: 这会是美好的一天，我很开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have done well. Let us be happy.
turns.zh: 你干得漂亮，咱们好好乐一乐。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will meet you at seven on the last day.
turns.zh: 最后一天七点我跟你碰头。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am pleased it went through.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You worked hard for it. Well done.
turns.zh: 你下了不少功夫，干得漂亮。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your help with the idea was a great thing.
turns.zh: 你帮我改想法起了大作用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that was nothing. You did the hard part.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Still, I had to say it to you first.
turns.zh: 不过我还是第一个告诉了你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind. So what then?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A meeting with the head is on for the week after this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will do well. I have no doubt.
turns.zh: 你肯定行，我一点都不怀疑。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a drink this week end to mark it?
turns.zh: 周末要不要喝一杯庆祝下？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is a great idea. I am in.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was ill at rest when the letter came.
turns.zh: 信来的时候我紧张坏了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did you see it right away?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the green stamp was right there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was a great feeling.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I almost sent my cup flying.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would have loved to see that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are the first I have said it to after my family.
turns.zh: 除了家人，你是我第一个告诉的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How long did you keep still?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three months of waiting, and much change.
turns.zh: 等了三个月，改了好多遍。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It was all good in the end.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You helped me with the writing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that was nothing.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, your ideas made it better.
turns.zh: 不，你的想法让方案更好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I am happy I was able to help.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you like a drink this week-end?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that very much.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The last day of the week at our old place?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Very good. I will make a booking.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This time it is on me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I am happy for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still can't quite take it in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You worked so hard for it.
turns.zh: 你为这个付出了那么多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All those late nights were a good use of time.
turns.zh: 那些加班的夜晚都值了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You were right there with me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I only gave a little help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your notes on the idea made a great change.
turns.zh: 你给方案提的意见起了大作用。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well then, we are a good group.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will send you the paper.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Please do. I would like to see it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it on the net for you now.
turns.zh: 我现在就发到网上给你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. What about a drink this rest day?
turns.zh: 那休息日去喝一杯怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. The end of the week?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. That place with the warm plates?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, I was going to say the same thing!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a table at eight?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Eight is good. I will make a booking.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. This one is on me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, no. Let me get this one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. We will sort it out then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am looking forward to it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Me too. It has been a long time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did all the hard work.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We did it together. Your help was key.
turns.zh: 我们一起做到的。你的帮忙很关键。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite. But you are the one who got it through.
turns.zh: 对。不过是你把它办成的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I still am not quite able to take it in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will get used to it. It is true now.
turns.zh: 你会习惯的。现在它是真的了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you the details after some time.
turns.zh: 我过一会儿把详情发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. I would like to see the full letter.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will see you on day six then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Have a good evening.

storyBlurb: 周三下午，甲刚收到申请通过的好消息，迫不及待地冲到办公室门口，与好友乙分享这份喜悦。两人约定周末庆祝，笑声在走廊回荡。
storyScript:
【开场·报喜】
周三下午五点，办公室的走廊里还残留着午后的暖意。甲从工位上弹起来，三步并作两步冲到门口，差点撞上正要下班的乙。甲的眼睛亮得像装了灯泡，嘴角压都压不住，一把拉住乙的胳膊：有好消息！乙被这阵仗逗笑了，顺势靠在门框上，等着听下文。

【进行·分享细节】
甲深吸一口气，把手机屏幕怼到乙眼前——是那封等了三个月的申请通过函。甲说，上周补交材料时心里还在打鼓，今天下午正对着电脑发呆，邮件提示音一响，心脏差点跳出来。点开一看，审批栏里赫然盖着绿色的通过章。甲说当时自己愣了三秒，然后从椅子上蹦起来，差点把咖啡杯扫到地上。乙听到这里已经笑出声，连连拍着甲的肩膀说太好了。甲又补充道，这次申请准备了整整半年，光是方案就改了十几版，连周末都在查资料。乙听完，眼神里满是佩服和高兴。

【进行·分享细节】
乙问起具体流程，甲便手舞足蹈地比划起来：从最初提交时的忐忑，到中间两次补件的煎熬，再到今天突然降临的惊喜。甲说，刚才给家里打完电话，第一个就想告诉乙，因为乙一直帮自己改方案、提建议，这份通过函里也有乙的功劳。乙摆摆手说哪里哪里，但脸上的笑意更深了。两人站在门口聊了好一会儿，夕阳把他们的影子拉得很长。

【收束·一起庆祝】
乙提议今晚就去吃顿好的，甲却摇头说今晚要加班收尾，但周末一定空出来。乙立刻掏出手机翻日历，两人当场敲定周六晚上去那家念叨了很久的馆子。甲说这次必须乙来点菜，自己请客。乙笑着应下，临走前又回头补了一句：到时候好好喝一杯。甲站在门口，看着乙的背影消失在走廊尽头，低头又看了一眼手机上的通过函，心里暖洋洋的。周末的约定，让这份喜悦又多了几分期待。
